  "findings": [
    "Supply air short-circuiting directly to return air intake",
    "Inadequate air distribution and potential for unbalanced system",
    "Non-compliance with SMACNA duct design and TAB balancing standards"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reconfigure supply diffuser or return grille location to prevent direct recirculation",
    "Adjust supply air throw pattern or install deflectors",
    "Re-balance system and verify air distribution per TAB report"
  ],
  "rationale": "Supply short-circuiting to return prevents conditioned air from reaching the occupied zone, causing ineffective temperature control, energy waste, and potential code violations. SMACNA standards require proper duct and diffuser layout to avoid such conditions, and TAB reports would flag this as a balancing failure.",

    "SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards",
    "TAB (Testing, Adjusting, and Balancing) procedures per NEBB or AABC"
  ]
